tallgrass.name: Tall Grass
tallgrass.flavor: Four tufts of tall grass bunched together in a plot. The perfect hiding place for small Pokémon

benchwithgreenery.name: Bench with greenery
benchwithgreenery.flavor: A bench near some hedges. Pokémon can rest here and bask in nature

yellowcarpet.name: Yellow carpet
yellowcarpet.flavor: A field of warm, blooming yellow flowers. Just looking at it seems to fill you with energy

fieldofflowers.name: Field of Flowers
fieldofflowers.flavor: A large field of flowers. Every petal emanates an ambrosial aroma

field-tripfriends.name: Field-trip friends
field-tripfriends.flavor: Pack a lunch box and canteen inside your backpack, and you're all set for a field trip

gardenterrace.name: Garden Terrace
gardenterrace.flavor: Take a breather in a garden chair while looking at softly lit flowers

treasure-huntingset.name: Treasure-hunting set
treasure-huntingset.flavor: A map and compass are essential treasure-hunting tools. Time to set off in search of jewels

campsite.name: Campsite
campsite.flavor: A campsite that celebrates elements of nature. Pokémon warm themselves in front of the campfire

dandelionlunchtime.name: Dandelion lunchtime
dandelionlunchtime.flavor: Lunch box? Check. Tableware? Check. Time for a picnic lunch break!

surroundedbystars.name: Surrounded by stars
surroundedbystars.flavor: Surrounded by shining stars and fluffy clouds, you'll feel like you're living in a dream

berry-feastcampsite.name: Berry-feast Campsite
berry-feastcampsite.flavor: A cozy campfire underneat a clear sky. Prepare a big feast and have a good time!

hydratedtallgrass.name: Hydrated tall grass
hydratedtallgrass.flavor: Tall grass along the water's edge. A habitat thriving with energy thanks to an abundance of water

floatingintheshade.name: Floating in the shade
floatingintheshade.flavor: Have fun on the inflatable boat! If you get tired, you can take a break under the umbrella

prettyflowerbed.name: Pretty flower bed
prettyflowerbed.flavor: A beautiful bed of wildflowers. A faint, sweet aroma wafts about it.

elevatedtallgrass.name: Elevated tall grass
elevatedtallgrass.flavor: Such a high elevation means this area is quite cool. The wind blows all the way through the tall grass

luxurychirp-chirpmeal.name: Luxury chirp-chirp meal
luxurychirp-chirpmeal.flavor: Bird Pokémon can lounge in the birdhouse after enjoying a meal of various berries

tropicalvibes.name: Tropical vibes
tropicalvibes.flavor: Seashore flowers rest beneath the leaves of a palm tree. Their tropical aroma drifts around the area

chanseyrestingarea.name: Chansey Resting area
chanseyrestingarea.flavor: A peaceful, refreshing spot to take a break while Chansey watches over you

elevatedflowerbed.name: Elevated flower bed
elevatedflowerbed.flavor: A bed of flowers blooming at high elevation. The wind carries their sweet aroma all around

illuminatedtallgrass.name: Illuminated tall grass
illuminatedtallgrass.flavor: A gently lit plot of tall grass. Pokémon are drawn to the inviting light

flowergarden.name: Flower garden
flowergarden.flavor: Plant some hedges near blooming flowers, and you'll have a decent garden in no time flat

illuminatedbench.name: Illuminated bench
illuminatedbench.flavor: A bench illuminated by gentle light. Pokémon entranced by the light might stop by

tree-shadedtallgrass.name: Tree-shaded  tall grass
tree-shadedtallgrass.flavor: Shaded tall grass that stays cool, even in the midday sun. Pokémon might stop by to relax

flowerytable.name: Flowery table
flowerytable.flavor: A flower vase placed on top of a table. Pokémon might sit on the chair to look at the flower.

irresistiblescentandglow.name: Irresistible scent and glow
irresistiblescentandglow.flavor: Pokémon may be lured here by the glow of the mushroom and the scent of the plant-shaped pot

seasidetallgrass.name: Seaside Tall Grass
seasidetallgrass.flavor: Tall grass that stands firm against the spray of saltwater. Good for escaping the seaside heat

bedwithaplush.name: Bed with a plush
bedwithaplush.flavor: A bed with a cute doll. Small Pokémon would probably feel safe sleeping here

fishingpond.name: Fishing pond
fishingpond.flavor: Cast a line and wait patiently. Perhaps a Water-type Pokémon will appear!

factorystorage.name: Factory Storage
factorystorage.flavor: The large machine doesn't seem to work, even if you plug in the cords and hit the buttons

trashcancentral.name: Trash can central
trashcancentral.flavor: Trash cans put in place to prevent littering. You can sometimes find Pokémon inside them

minigamecorner.name: Mini Game Corner
minigamecorner.flavor: When you're done playing arcade games, you can hit up the punching game to get your body moving!

smoothtallgrass.name: Smooth tall grass
smoothtallgrass.flavor: A strange smooth rock has drained the vitality from this tall grass

clink-clangironconstruction.name: Clink-clang iron construction
clink-clangironconstruction.flavor: It looks like construction is underway. Some strong Pokémon might show up to help

gravewithflowers.name: Grave with flowers
gravewithflowers.flavor: A habitat that exudes a gentle elegance. Pokémon could rest in joyful peace here

trainingwaterfall.name: Training waterfall
trainingwaterfall.flavor: Pokémon who like to train may come here to sit under the waterfall and tone their bodies

urgentcare.name: Urgent Care
urgentcare.flavor: When injured, seek first aid immediately! Pokémon skilled at healing may come to this habitat.

trashcollectionsite.name: Trash collection site
trashcollectionsite.flavor: A place to dump everyone's garbage. You might even spot some trash-hunting Pokémon here!

gymfirstaid.name: Gym first aid
gymfirstaid.flavor: A first-aid kit is on hand in case any Pokémon injure themselves exercising

exerciserestingspot.name: Exercise resting spot
exerciserestingspot.flavor: After a fierce training session, Pokémon can rest their tired bodies on this bench

goodold-fashionedantiques.name: Good old-fashioned antiques
goodold-fashionedantiques.flavor: Enjoy the retro vibe of this collection of wonderful antique furniture!

oceanfishingspot.name: Ocean fishing spot
oceanfishingspot.flavor: Ocean fishing can be fun! You may meet different species of Pokémon than you would in fresh water.

illuminatedwaterfall.name: Illuminated waterfall
illuminatedwaterfall.flavor: Use the torches to light a path to the waterfall. Pokémon might stop by to check it out

hydratedflowerbed.name: Hydrated flower bed
hydratedflowerbed.flavor: A field of blooming waterside flowers. Pokémon may be attracted by the aroma and clear water.

gentlylitbed.name: Gently lit bed
gentlylitbed.flavor: A bed bathed in gentle light. Pokémon could probably sleep peacefully here

tantalizingdiningset.name: Tantalizing dining set
tantalizingdiningset.flavor: A table set with dishes-and a chair for sitting. Hungry Pokémon might swing by here..

dinnertablesurprise.name: Dinner table surprise
dinnertablesurprise.flavor: There's no better thrill than lifting the lid off a dish to reveal today's meal

sunnydaysite.name: Sunny Day site
sunnydaysite.flavor: Reminders of sunshine and a plate for offering food. This is the perfect spot to call for fair weather

tree-shadedflowerbed.name: Tree-shaded flower bed
tree-shadedflowerbed.flavor: Beautifully blooming flowers beneath the shade ofa tree. Pokémon are attracted by the damp scent

roadsign.name: Road Sign
roadsign.flavor: A solitary sign by the middle of the road. Pokémon might head in the arrow's direction

freshveggiefield.name: Fresh Veggie Field
freshveggiefield.flavor: Vegetables growing in a nice, wild field. Seems likely to attact Pokémon who enjoy farming

plushcentral.name: Plush central
plushcentral.flavor: Some Pokémon might mistake all these dolls for the real things

ridingwarmupdrafts.name: Riding warm updrafts
ridingwarmupdrafts.flavor: The warm air from three campfires rises high into the sky!

boulder-shadedtallgrass.name: Boulder-shaded Tall Grass
boulder-shadedtallgrass.flavor: tall grass near a large boulder. Perfect for hide-and-seek

largeluggagecarrier.name: Large luggage carrier
largeluggagecarrier.flavor: This long, wide cart can fit two large crates

construction-sitegenerator.name: Construction-site generator
construction-sitegenerator.flavor: Construction needs a lot of electricity! You can use any leftover lumber as fuel

graveoffering.name: Grave offering
graveoffering.flavor: Candles and plated food placed silently before a gravestone. Pretty creepy…

creepygraveoffering.name: Creepy grave offering
creepygraveoffering.flavor: Light the candles by the gravestone to add some swaying blue flames for double the eeriness

cozyloghandicrafts.name: Cozy log handicrafts
cozyloghandicrafts.flavor: This space is packed with wooden furniture. It feels almost like you're in a mountain cabin

raindancesite.name: Rain Dance site
raindancesite.flavor: Reminders of rain and a plate for offering food. The perfect spot to call for rainy weather

very-berryspace.name: Very-berry space
very-berryspace.flavor: A berry table, a berry bed…Everything's a berry! Just looking at them makes you hungry

picnicset.name: Picnic Set
picnicset.flavor: A basked placed atop a table is all it takes to feel a little picnicky

fullrecovery.name: Full recovery
fullrecovery.flavor: Nothing like a good nap when you're feeling sick. A caring Pokémon might even come to check in!

tree-shadedyellowtallgrass.name: Tree-shaded Yellow tall grass
tree-shadedyellowtallgrass.flavor: Yellow tall grass in the shade of a tree. The habitat has a melancholy feel to it.

parkbench.name: Park bench
parkbench.flavor: After eating a snack, put your trash in the trash can. …Think Pokémon can remember to do that?

elevatedyellowtallgrass.name: Elevated yellow tall grass
elevatedyellowtallgrass.flavor: Yellow tall grass growing at high elevation. It sways back and forth in the sea breeze

trashdisposalsite.name: Trash disposal site
trashdisposalsite.flavor: Some trash left by a power pole. Its surroundings smell a little stinky

restingspot.name: Resting spot
restingspot.flavor: Empty cardboard boxes and a fluffy straw bed. Opinions are divided on which provides better sleep.

workingtheregister.name: Working the register
workingtheregister.flavor: Put a register on a table, power it on, and boom! You'll be ready for business in no time

evilorganizationhq.name: Evil organization HQ
evilorganizationhq.flavor: A comfy couch in front of an organization's emblem. Sitting here makes you feel like a boss.

hot-springshower.name: Hot-spring shower
hot-springshower.flavor: You can't jump in the hot spring without rinsing off at a shower first! Pokémon might enjoy soaking here

perpetualmess.name: Perpetual mess
perpetualmess.flavor: Scattered toys and cardboard. Just when you think you're done tidying up, the mess somehow returns.

resortmealprep.name: Resort meal prep
resortmealprep.flavor: Sitting by a campfire underneat a palm tree…Let's kick back and cook some food

minimuseum.name: Mini museum
minimuseum.flavor: Anything can look like a masterpiece if you pop it on an exhibition stand!

magmafishingspot.name: Magma fishing spot
magmafishingspot.flavor: Catch Pokémon by fishing in magma. Wait, how do you do that without the line melting?!

marshfishingspot.name: Marsh fishing spot
marshfishingspot.flavor: Pokémon live in marshlands too! Try casting your lin into some swampy water sometime

spookystudy.name: Spooky study
spookystudy.flavor: Light thre candle to read by firelight! This place feels spooky when night falls

surpriseinstore.name: Surprise in store
surpriseinstore.flavor: A pop-art box surrounded by balloons. What's in the box? Open it and find out!

playingpirate.name: Playing pirate
playingpirate.flavor: Stand in front of the wheel or ight by the cannons, and you'll feel like you're sailing the open seas!

shadedbeach.name: Shaded beach
shadedbeach.flavor: The leaves of a palm tree serve as a parasol to Pokémon resting in the beach chair.

alarmclocksleepzone.name: Alarm clock sleep zone
alarmclocksleepzone.flavor: Setting the bedside alarm clock makes waking up in the morning a breeze

vendingmachineset.name: Vending machine set
vendingmachineset.flavor: A trash can beside a vending machine. Doesn't look like there are any empty cans inside

cutenessoverload.name: Cuteness overload
cutenessoverload.flavor: Being surrounded by all this cute furniture will make you feel perfectly pampered

light-upstage.name: Light-up stage
light-upstage.flavor: A stage bathed in dazzling light. It seems likely to attract attention-seeking Pokémon

tropicalseaside.name: Tropical seaside
tropicalseaside.flavor: Kick back by a palm tree and feel the ocean breeze for the full tropical experience

tree-shadedsnoozingsnorlax.name: Tree-shaded snoozing Snorlax
tree-shadedsnoozingsnorlax.flavor: Pokémon might come here mistakenly thinking that this is an actual sleeping Snorlax!

yellowtallgrass.name: Yellow tall grass
yellowtallgrass.flavor: A small plot made up of four tufts of yellow tall grass. Spots like this are often found in harbor towns

overgrowthvendingmachine.name: Overgrowth vending machine
overgrowthvendingmachine.flavor: A lone vending machine amid yellow tall grass. Gotta stay hydrated-even out in nature

knittingstation.name: Knitting station
knittingstation.flavor: Pokémon will be fascinated by the fluffy yarn and the adorable crafts that can be made from it

nightfestivalvenue.name: Night festival venue
nightfestivalvenue.flavor: The colorful neon lights of this festival entrance glow brilliantly, especially at night

plainlife.name: Plain life
plainlife.flavor: A simple yet calming space. Pokémon are sure to be comfortable here.

dock.name: Dock
dock.flavor: A cozy little dock on the beach. Swimming Pokémon might stop by now and then.

hydratedyellowtallgrass.name: Hydrated yellow tall grass
hydratedyellowtallgrass.flavor: Yellow tall grass by the water. A nice resting spot for Pokémon after they're done swimmign

marshytallgrass.name: Marshy tall grass
marshytallgrass.flavor: Tall grass growing in a marsh. Pokémon use this to wipe mud off themselves

tinyatelier.name: Tiny Atelier
tinyatelier.flavor: Take a seat in front of the canvas and let your imagination run wild. Inspiration is waiting to strike!

chirp-chirpmeal.name: Chirp-chirp meal
chirp-chirpmeal.flavor: Bird Pokémon are sure to come and enjoy feasting on the plated food.

furnacespot.name: Furnace Spot
furnacespot.flavor: When you fuel this amazing contraption, it generates electricity with the power of fire

welcomingresort.name: Welcoming resort
welcomingresort.flavor: Relax on the sofa or lie down on the hammock, and you'll feel like you're in the lap of luxury.

windyflowerbed.name: Windy Flower Bed
windyflowerbed.flavor: A breeze whooshes over this cool flower bed. As the windmill turns, a floral aroma  spreads far and wide.

waterwheelspot.name: Waterwheel Spot
waterwheelspot.flavor: This amazing facility generaes electriciy through the power of a waterfall

allpackedup.name: All packed up
allpackedup.flavor: Let's pack some cardboard boxes full of stuff and stack them on top of a cart!

tablesidedeliverycart.name: Tableside delivery cart
tablesidedeliverycart.flavor: Wheel out the dishes nice and slow, because once they reach the table, it's chow time

breezyflowerbed.name: Breezy flower bed
breezyflowerbed.flavor: A bed of refreshing seashore flowers. Pokémon are drawn in by its gentle scent

changingarea.name: Changing area
changingarea.flavor: Give your look a once-over in the mirror after you change clothes. A place to become your ideal self!

vendingmachinebreakarea.name: Vending machine break area
vendingmachinebreakarea.flavor: A long bench beside a vending machine. Pokémon might swing by to take a breather.

privatemakeupstand.name: Private makeup stand
privatemakeupstand.flavor: The partition helps keep prying eyes away before you're ready for the public

pikachuspace.name: Pikachu space
pikachuspace.flavor: The sofa and doll are both Pikachu! Some Pokémon might mistake them for the real Pikachu and stop by

tantalizingrestaurant.name: Tantalizing restaurant
tantalizingrestaurant.flavor: Dishes on a table. There's even a menu, so it's just like being in a restaurant.

cafespace.name: Café space
cafespace.flavor: Enjoy teatime while admiring the potted tree. Pokémon can feel refreshed here

beachset.name: Beach Set
beachset.flavor: Lounge under this parasol, and bask in the tropical vibes. Pokémon might enjoy relaxing here.

gracefulflowerbed.name: Graceful flower bed
gracefulflowerbed.flavor: Numerous mountain flowers bloom to form an elegant and beautiful flower bed.

bronzelandmark.name: Bronze landmark
bronzelandmark.flavor: A photoworthy bronze statue of three Pokémon. Their combined cuteness is sure to attract a crowd!

hydratedgracefulflowerbed.name: Hydrated graceful flower bed
hydratedgracefulflowerbed.flavor: These elegant mountain flowers bloom beautifully, even right beside thew ater.

flowergardenstumpstage.name: Flower garden stump stage
flowergardenstumpstage.flavor: A stage set up in a field of flowers. Hop on the stump to bathe in the spotlight and feel just like a star

recitalstage.name: Recital stage
recitalstage.flavor: This stage was made for just one thing-now get up there and SING!

houseparty.name: House party
houseparty.flavor: Help yourself to food and drinks, and have a total blast with all your friends

containersnacking.name: Container snacking
containersnacking.flavor: Looks like someone snuck a snack by some storage containers. Pokémon might like a spot like this

tree-shadedredtallgrass.name: Tree-shaded red tall grass
tree-shadedredtallgrass.flavor: Pokmon are drawn to this place, invited by the damp aroma of the red tall grass.

grassytrainingfield.name: Grassy training field
grassytrainingfield.flavor: The bags of dirt can be used as dumbbells. Perfect for Pokémon who love to train

boxtotherhythm.name: Box to the rhythm
boxtotherhythm.flavor: Pokémon can feel the rhythm here and get pumped for a training session

mossyboulder.name: Mossy boulder
mossyboulder.flavor: A quiet, peaceful atmosphere. It looks like Pokémon could really unwind here

diggingandburning.name: Digging and burning
diggingandburning.flavor: A big furnace with equipment next to it. Someone might come to light the flame

elevatedredtallgrass.name: Elevated red tall grass
elevatedredtallgrass.flavor: Red tall grass flourishes even in high-altitude areas like mountaintops

minikitchen.name: Mini kitchen
minikitchen.flavor: Wash your dishes and ingredients, then cook away on the stove. What's on the menu for today?

tree-shadedgracefulflowerbed.name: Tree-shaded graceful flower bed
tree-shadedgracefulflowerbed.flavor: The elegant aroma of these mountain flowers wafts all throughout the area

chirpingrecital.name: Chirping recital
chirpingrecital.flavor: Bird Pokémon may swoop in and use the microphone to show off their singing skills

mossyrestspot.name: Mossy rest spot
mossyrestspot.flavor: All that nice, damp moss makes this a great location for Pokémon who love humid places

toilinthesoil.name: Toil in the soil
toilinthesoil.flavor: A thriving vegetable field. Replacing the soil every so often provides fresh nutrients

hydratedredtallgrass.name: Hydrated red tall grass
hydratedredtallgrass.flavor: While red tall grass often grows in valleys, it also thrives just fine on the waterside

tree-shadedpinktallgrass.name: Tree-shaded pink tall grass
tree-shadedpinktallgrass.flavor: Growing in the shade of a tree, this pink grass is just the tiniest bit damp

upliftingduckweed.name: Uplifting duckweed
upliftingduckweed.flavor: You can walk on top of the duckweed or jump into the water and float next to them

mossyhotspring.name: Mossy hot spring
mossyhotspring.flavor: A hot spring surrounded by green moss. Soak up the calming atmosphere as you soak in warm water.

hot-springfishingspot.name: Hot-spring Fishing Spot
hot-springfishingspot.flavor: Pokémon enjoying a nice dip in the hot spring might be lure in with some bait.

redtallgrass.name: Red tall grass
redtallgrass.flavor: A small plot made up of four tufts of red tall grass. Spots like this are often found in valleys

piping-hotlava.name: Piping-hot lava
piping-hotlava.flavor: Nothin' but piping-hot lava here! Fire-type Pokémon simply can't resist visiting

musicandmagazines.name: Music and magazines
musicandmagazines.flavor: Reading feels even more relaxing when you throw on some background music

pointytree-shadedrockytallgrass.name: Pointy tree-shaded rocky tall grass
pointytree-shadedrockytallgrass.flavor: Lean against the rock in the tall grass, and take a break while admiring the large pointy tree.

modernliving.name: Modern living
modernliving.flavor: Stylishly simple. The modern design gives off a sense of classiness

open-airbath.name: Open-air bath
open-airbath.flavor: Pokémon can also soak in a nice hot spring while enjoying beautiful scenery

heavyiron.name: Heavy iron
heavyiron.flavor: A monochromatic space with weighty furniture. Light the lantern to add another layer of calm

refreshinglockerroom.name: Refreshing locker room
refreshinglockerroom.flavor: Even a simple locker room can have a refreshing atmosphere with the addition of a houseplant or two.

railroadcrossing.name: Railroad crossing
railroadcrossing.flavor: Absolutely no crossing while the bar is lowered! But…will Pokémon actually sotp and wait?

lazy-photoalbumscrolling.name: Lazy-photo album scrolling
lazy-photoalbumscrolling.flavor: Kick back with a drink in your hand and use the tablet to reminisce over some photos

ampedrockstage.name: Amped rock stage
ampedrockstage.flavor: The wail of the guitar marks the start of this amped-up performance

low-keyrockstage.name: Low-key rock stage
low-keyrockstage.flavor: The hum of the bass guitar marks the start of al ow-key musical performance

bestbreadbakery.name: Best bread bakery
bestbreadbakery.flavor: Prepare some side dishes while you wait for bread to finish baking.

creepywhiterocks.name: Creepy white rocks
creepywhiterocks.flavor: The thick moss near the stalagmites and the long glowing lantern create a slightly creepy vibe.

fluffyflowerbed.name: Fluffy flower bed
fluffyflowerbed.flavor: A cute field full of lots of puffy skyland flowers

absoluteluxury.name: Absolute luxury
absoluteluxury.flavor: Every single piece of this furniture set is top-notch, creating the ultimate air of luxury

nineflames.name: Nine flames
nineflames.flavor: The gentle sway of these nine blazing flames gives their surroundings a subtly mystical ambeience

squeakyclean.name: Squeaky clean
squeakyclean.flavor: Put lots of cleaner on the Mareep spone and make that bathroom shine

hydratedfluffyflowerbed.name: Hydrated fluffy flower bed
hydratedfluffyflowerbed.flavor: Water can't diminish the gentle aroma wafting from these skyland flowers.

sewerholeinspection.name: Sewer hole inspection
sewerholeinspection.flavor: Looks like repairs are being carried out here. Only workers are allowed in-no exceptions!

dojotraining.name: Dojo training
dojotraining.flavor: Once you emply the spirit of the warrior, you will be able to move even the heaviest of boulders

harmonioushotspring.name: Harmonious hot spring
harmonioushotspring.flavor: Some Pokémon enjoy moving between the hot spring and the cold bath to feel light and refreshed

surgingpsychicpower.name: Surging psychic power
surgingpsychicpower.flavor: Sit in front of the crystal ball and focus to gain mastery over your psychic powers…maybe.

experimentspace.name: Experiment Space
experimentspace.flavor: A space for conducting experiments. Someone may have left their research notes behind.

workdesk.name: Work desk
workdesk.flavor: Sit on the office chair and type away at the computer. If you feel tired, grab a beverage and take a break!

gamecornerbattlezone.name: Game Corner battle zone
gamecornerbattlezone.flavor: Players site side by side here to game against each other!P okémon might come here to play.

simplebathroom.name: Simple bathroom
simplebathroom.flavor: An ordinary bathroom. Pokémon might stop by to wash themselves.

watersidedinghy.name: Waterside dinghy
watersidedinghy.flavor: Board the canoe, or just enjoy some tranquil time relaxing by the waterside

concretepipesecretbase.name: Concrete pipe secret base
concretepipesecretbase.flavor: A concrete pipe that hasn't been used in al ong time. The hollow interior is perfect for a secret base.

fireplacenapspot.name: Fireplace nap spot
fireplacenapspot.flavor: If you're feeling chilly, you can sit by this fireplace and it will gently warm you.

officestoreroom.name: Office storeroom
officestoreroom.flavor: Packed with old documents and unused equipment. Lost Pokémon sometimes wander inside.

toppop.name: Top pop
toppop.flavor: The colorful pop-art furniture gives off a cheerful atmosphere that'll lift your spirits in no time!

hometheater.name: Home theater
hometheater.flavor: Some big speakers and a TV make this space feel just likea  movie theater

tree-shadedfluffyflowerbed.name: Tree-shaded fluffy flower bed
tree-shadedfluffyflowerbed.flavor: Poofy skyland flowers bloom cutely-even in the cool shade of a tree

studyarea.name: Study Area
studyarea.flavor: Just sitting at this desk with a pencil in hand is enough to make you feel a little smarter

moisturizingmakeupstand.name: Moisturizing makeup stand
moisturizingmakeupstand.flavor: Making sure your skin is moisturized will ensure your makeup comes out even more perfectly than usual!

pinktallgrass.name: Pink tall grass
pinktallgrass.flavor: A small plot made up of four tufts of pink tall grass. Spots like this are often found in the skylands

minilibrary.name: Mini library
minilibrary.flavor: Light the lamp to peruse the books at your leisure, even in the dark ofnight

picturesquephotocutoutboard.name: Picturesque photo cutout board
picturesquephotocutoutboard.flavor: Say cheese! Stick your face in the cutoutboard and snap a photo to commemorate your hoke.

birdsonggarden.name: Birdsong garden
birdsonggarden.flavor: A comfy birdhouse with a neatly trimmed hedge. You can almost hear chirping

trashsitetv.name: Trash site TV
trashsitetv.flavor: A lone TV left out with the garbage. It looks like it can still be turned on.

cyclingreststop.name: Cycling rest stop
cyclingreststop.flavor: Stop your bicycle here for a quick break. Pokémon sometimes hide behind the vending machine.

playland.name: Playland
playland.flavor: To play on the big slide or with the toys… Now that's a hard choice

hydratedpinktallgrass.name: Hydrated pink tall grass
hydratedpinktallgrass.flavor: The pink of the tall grass contrasts beautifully with the blue hues of the water.

publicreadingmaterial.name: Public reading material
publicreadingmaterial.flavor: Anyone can freely pick up and enjoy the newspapers and magazines found here

prankbutton.name: Prank button
prankbutton.flavor: A conspicuous button next to a boo-in-the-box. To press, or not to press, that is the questino.

tirepark.name: Tire Park
tirepark.flavor: For some reason, the tires are more enticing than the big slide… Yeah! Let's play with all the different tires!

elevatedpinktallgrass.name: Elevated pink tall grass
elevatedpinktallgrass.flavor: Tall pink grass from way above the clouds. Even strong winds can't stop it from growing

rhythmiclivingroom.name: Rhythmic Living room
rhythmiclivingroom.flavor: A large TV with a rhythm game hooked up to it. Step on the mats in time with the beat!

interrogationdesk.name: Interrogation desk
interrogationdesk.flavor: You and Arcanine, interrogating perps side by side… The tension in the air is palpable

heart-poundingsurprisebox.name: Heart-pounding surprise box
heart-poundingsurprisebox.flavor: The rhythm of the big drum, the spotlights on the boo-in-the-box… The suspense is palpable!

oversizeddumpingground.name: Oversized dumping ground
oversizeddumpingground.flavor: A dumping ground where you can even throw away large items. Unwanted appliances can go here!

wingfossildisplay.name: Wing Fossil Display
wingfossildisplay.flavor: A display of ancient Pokémon fossils. This fine skeletal specimen was once ruler of the skies

headbuttfossildisplay.name: Headbutt Fossil display
headbuttfossildisplay.flavor: A display of ancient Pokémon fossils. This speciment's skull was harder than steel

skullfossildisplay.name: Skull Fossil display
skullfossildisplay.flavor: A display of an ancient Pokémon fossil. This fossilized skull is as hard as iron

armorfossildisplay.name: Armor Fossil display
armorfossildisplay.flavor: A display of an ancient Pokémon fossil. It features a hard neck frill that looks like a shield.

shieldfossildisplay.name: Shield Fossil display
shieldfossildisplay.flavor: A display of ancient Pokémon fossils. This speciment's large neck frill was as sturdy as a fortress wall.

jawfossildisplay.name: Jaw Fossil display
jawfossildisplay.flavor: A display of an ancient Pokémon fossil. It features a piece of a jawbone that could crush anything,

despotfossildisplay.name: Despot fossil display
despotfossildisplay.flavor: A display of ancient Pokémon fossils. This fine skeletal specimen was once the ruler of the land.

sailfossildisplay.name: Sail Fossil display
sailfossildisplay.flavor: A display of an ancient Pokémon fossil. This piece of neck sail was once frozen in ice.

tundrafossildisplay.name: Tundra fossil display
tundrafossildisplay.flavor: A display of ancient Pokémon fossils. The specimen's beautiful neck sail resembles an aurora.

boundlessbluebeverage.name: Boundless blue beverage
boundlessbluebeverage.flavor: A clear-blue ice-cream float. It's like looking deep into the ocean

electrifyingpotatoes.name: Electrifying potatoes
electrifyingpotatoes.flavor: A basket of crispy potato stars. They're shockingly delicious!

burning-hotspice.name: Burning-hot spice
burning-hotspice.flavor: Putting hot sauce on this round pizza will make it so spicy that you'll feel like you're breathing fire.

elegantdaytimetreats.name: Elegant daytime treats
elegantdaytimetreats.flavor: Teatime is always midday. Take a seat, have a snack, and bask in the elegance of it all.

dark-chocolatecookies.name: Dark-chocolate cookies
dark-chocolatecookies.flavor: Cookies made from dark chocolate. They have a subtle, comforting taste without being overly sweet

leafygreenssandwich.name: Leafy greens sandwich
leafygreenssandwich.flavor: A sandwich packed with greens and veggies would really hit the spot right now

chillyshavedice.name: Chilly shaved ice
chillyshavedice.flavor: Shaved ice served with frozen toppings. Eating this could make you feel teeth-chatteringly chilly

lovelyribboncake.name: Lovely ribbon cake
lovelyribboncake.flavor: The large ribbon and heart decorations make this cake look quite lovely. It tastes incredibly sweet.
